UnusedPrivateProperty:AiLandPlayOrderTest.kt$AiLandPlayOrderTest$val turn1Diffs = gsMessages .filter { it.gameStateMessage.turnInfo.turnNumber == 1 } .map { gre -> val gsm = gre.gameStateMessage val cats = gsm.annotationsList .filter { it.typeList.contains(AnnotationType.ZoneTransfer_af5a) } .flatMap { ann -> ann.detailsList.filter { it.key == "category" }.flatMap { it.valueStringList } } "gsId=${gsm.gameStateId} objs=${gsm.gameObjectsCount} cats=$cats" }
